description_wiki: Kenya, officially the Republic of Kenya, is a country located in East Africa.
Uganda, officially the Republic of Uganda, is a landlocked country in East Africa.

The United Nations (UN) is a global intergovernmental organization established by the signing of the UN Charter on 26 June 1945 with the articulated mission of maintaining international peace and security, to develop friendly relations among states, to promote international cooperation, and to serve as a centre for harmonizing the actions of states in achieving those goals.

description: city in Missouri, United States, that is one of two county seats of Jackson County and the largest city in Missouri
description_wiki: Kansas City, abbreviated KC or KCMO, is the largest city in the U.S. state of Missouri by both population and area.
Somalia, officially the Federal Republic of Somalia, is the easternmost country in continental Africa.

description: country located primarily in North America
description_wiki: The United States of America (USA), also known as the United States (U.S.) or America, is a country primarily located in North America.

description: monotheistic Abrahamic religion founded by Muhammad
description_wiki: Islam is an Abrahamic monotheistic religion based on the Quran and the teachings of Muhammad.

description: Abrahamic monotheistic religion founded on the teachings, person and life of Jesus
description_wiki: Christianity is an Abrahamic monotheistic religion, which states that Jesus is the Son of God and rose from the dead after his crucifixion, whose coming as the messiah (Christ) was prophesied in the Old Testament and chronicled in the New Testament.

description: religion widely practiced in the Indian subcontinent
description_wiki: Hinduism () is an umbrella term for a range of Indian religious and spiritual traditions (sampradayas) that are unified by adherence to the concept of dharma, a cosmic order maintained by its followers through rituals and righteous living, as expounded in the Vedas.

description: holy month of fasting for Muslims, observed on the ninth month of the Islamic calendar
description_wiki: Ramadan is the ninth month of the Islamic calendar.

description: Islamic holiday on the first of Shawwal
description_wiki: Eid al-Fitr is the first of the two main festivals in Islam, the other being Eid al-Adha.
Yogyakarta is the capital city of the Special Region of Yogyakarta in Indonesia, in the south-central part of the island of Java.

description: island country in Southeast Asia and Oceania
description_wiki: Indonesia, officially the Republic of Indonesia, is a country in Southeast Asia and Oceania, between the Indian and Pacific oceans.
